news.t: Aberdeen Investments Expands Active ETF Suite with Fixed Income and International Small Cap

holdings.infoBox: ASCI is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares MSCI India Small Cap ETF stock at 5.62%, Diploma at 4.58%, Japan Elevator Service Holdings at 4.14%, ASICS at 3.86%, and Games Workshop Group at 3.85%.

overview.description: The Abrdn International Small Cap Active ETF (ASCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund fund aims for long-term capital growth by actively managing a portfolio of small capitalization companies outside the US. ASCI was launched on Sep 30, 1996 and is issued by aberdeen.
